description: Analyze the traffic patterns in the capture file '/home/ga/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' to identify bursts and idle periods. Save a text report to '/home/ga/Documents/traffic_rate_report.txt' containing the following fields (one per line, 'LABEL: value' format): CAPTURE_DURATION_SECS (floor of last_timestamp - first_timestamp), TOTAL_PACKETS, AVERAGE_PPS (total_packets / duration, rounded to 2 decimal places), PEAK_PPS (maximum packets in any single one-second interval), PEAK_SECOND (0-indexed offset of the peak; use earliest if tied), IDLE_SECONDS (count of one-second intervals with zero packets
